name: Freshly Baked Cookie, Real Chicken and Peanut Butter, 2kg 025
description: All dogs love the taste of soft and chewy treats that make their tails wag and their mouths water. Hanu Treats are delicious, tender snacks that are made with real chicken and fortified with over 15 vitamins and minerals. With over 10 years of experience in dog treats, you know Hanu brand dog snacks uses only high quality ingredients.100 percent all natural, 100 percent premium human grade, 100 percent good for canines. Packed with nutrition and flavour.
